column1: Hey Avery, thanks for your interest in rolling with us at SpringBreak U. Your personal trip rep, Spiffy, will text you in a few to get you squared away with info and details
What's good! It's Spiffy here with SpringBreak U
Which week is your spring break? I'll send over the options for that week
Bet! Which destination were we lookin at?
Dope yea that's where I'll be too. I'm there every year
How many ppl in your group so far?
Oo cool that's a solid squad, we all from the same school?
Oh dope think we have a group from your school already too. Def down to hook it up
Gonna put the info together for you rn, how soon were you lookin to get things started?
Yay and soonish cause we don't want it to get more expensive
okay cool yea thats the smartest way to go about it. things are getting super busy so hotels flights everything is on the rise
cool if I send the details through email? its a little long for text
just sent it over lmk if you got it! the occidental punta cana package is the best one for sure, it's also where I'll be so I can hook it up with $50 the pricing you see there
Ok ya the prices look good we would prob go through u guys for flights Dyk how much that'd be
Also how much would it be for the trolleys to the out of resort clubs
And were there any party's on the resort I've seen a bunch abt the Riu resort and the party's there is this resort the same basically
okay dope yea which airport do you want to fly out of? ill look that up now
for transportation to the off resort nightclubs in Punta Cana, it comes with the party pass. so we have coach buses that bring all of our groups together. picks up right at the front of the resort
and yea we had a ton of parties at the occidental punta cana. ill send you a couple vids
Boston or Hartford ct or if there's anything out of New Haven ct which I doubt there is
yea so boston may be the cheapest but I know hartford is gonna be closer for you
okay cool yea ill check it out rn
honestly tho you prolly will save money getting flights separately on your own. its def more convenient to do it all in one, but it may be cheaper to do it separate
Kk ya I'll def look at both options
What are the clubs that come included w the party package
Also what would the payment plan/schedule be
the clubs are lit! We host parties at Imagine Cave, Which is a literal Cave turned nightclub, Coco Bongo which is the most well known, and Maroca, I'll send you over some vids
I'm trying to convince everyone to get the party package cause I've heard those are really fun
Could u also let me know what the payment plan would look at
That is imagine ^ I'd def recommend it, everyone ends up doing it

and yea so payment plan can be curated to what works best for you, usually for Punta this time of the year it would look like this (Sample) Deposit - Due October 14th - $20 1st payment- Due Oct. 30th - $250 2nd payment - Due Nov. 30th- $250 Final Payment - Due Dec. 15th- Balance
we can def change it up to what works best for you, that's just a sample
Ok ya is there a date everything needs to be paid off by
Dec. 15th is usually when final payments are made with the payment plan, would that work for y'all?
Oct 16: $20 Oct 30: $175 Nov 30: $250 Dec 15: $175 Jan 15: $146 Total paid = $766 Would this work
potentially! Lemme reach out to my director and see if i can get the greenlight
which package were you guys looking to do?
The party 4 night and we'd add the party package so the 200
ok dope, Let me see what i can finesse for y'all
Thank u so muchhhh the cheapest option pls lol
But we do want to do the party pass lol
Also do we have to pay any xtra hotel fees or gratuities
Also how much is the protection plan
Heyy sorry still waiting to hear from my director, but as for hotel fees they usually don't have any, they may have a security deposit but years past they haven't
and the protection plan is through a third party insurance agency called travel insured, the price differs state to state but i've seen it range anywhere from $75-$150
Ok sounds good just let me know if he approves it
got the payment plan you requested approved
we'll want to get moving today tho, next step I'll create the reservation and send over the link for everyone to start slotting in
deposit would be due tomorrow 10/16 still btw
Ok great I'm not home right now I'll be home at 6 and I can have everyone do it
yea no worries, sounds good will send so you have it for later on
I'll be around later if anyone has any questions too
Ok great thank you so much
Tomorrow would be the 20 dollars correct
There's no extra tips we have to pay at the resort right
yup so $20 tomorrow will reserve your spots and the payment plan
there arent any extra fees nope. the only thing that I've seen in past years in a fee for incidentals at check in, like they do at most hotels. it gets refunded at check out tho
but tbh during spring break season I've seen it get waived for our incoming groups
and then, you can always bring money for tips for the cleaning staff when they come clean rooms, bell boys that help you with your bags, bartenders, etc. but not mandatory at all
Ok great thank u so much I'll send u a txt when i get home at 6
Everyone will sign up by tm night and have sent the 20 for 10/16 payment
Thank u so much for ur help with everything?
okay cool awesome! you wanted to handle the payment for each person?
Each person can pay with there own card right
the way we have it set up, each person is able to make their own payments. but I can switch it so that you handle one payment for the deposits and it get dispersed to each persons account
No ya the way u have it set up is perfect everyone will make there own payments
oh okay okay. thought you meant they sent you the 20 each lol
but yea everythings good to go!
Oh no sorry everyone will have there 20 sent to u tm tho
gotcha. okay bet, lmk if any questions come up in the meantime
Is there any way we can push the payment back by a week my roomates are just still trying to all coordinate everything we just need a couple days to figure it out we're defiantly in tho
Or even just like till Monday
Yea how many ppl need more time?

Like 7 like all of them are down tho and there all gonna go they just need like a couple days cause rent is also due tomorrow which is 600 but everyone is down they just need like a few days to coordinate everything we're also trying to buy flights this week too so it's just a lot of money fast but there all down and eveyone will have the first payment to you by Monday
I think it's suppose to be 11/30
Also this has 12/15 for two payments I think the date is wrong
Is it? Will fix that now
Thank u! Is Monday ok tho
That's fixed. And then 7 ppl total need til Monday? Are the others okay to deposit tomorrow
That'll help me keep the reservation open and active
I think every body could use till Monday I can put down my 20 tm tho
Well I could do mine tm
Okay, let's do that. That way it's easier for me to explain to operations what's up
Ok great I'll do mine now
Cool, I would hop in the very first slot at the top
One of my roomates Kai did
It's all good, I see it
Can some people do the party package and then can some people not
Yea we can do that, lmk who doesn't want to
Tbh tho I feel like in the end they're gonna want to add it back in
I've seen it too many times lol. It makes the trip so much better
No I know that's what I'm trying to tell people
What if some people wanted to do like one night at the clubs
Yea and lowkey it's gonna be more expensive later on when they go to add them individually
They can, the single prices are more than that $200 bundle tho
How much is the single prices
And would we still get transportation through the company
Yea transportation comes with the individual party tickets. They'd still get the open bar, cover charge, express entry with it
How much is the e individual party ticket
Right now individually Imagine Cave is $95, Coco Bongo $79, Maroca $69. Booze cruise is $75
If they were to add them individually on their accounts
Ok perfect ya I think a lot of people are gonna do that
Aight just lmk who wants the bundle and who doesn't and I'll adjust the slots
But I def recommend keeping it's the way to go. Totally up to them tho
Ya I'm trying to everyone to keep the party package some ppl def will
Yeaa, is it cause of the money?
Do they need to see videos of how lit each event is? lol
Yeahh hahah it is cause of the money
But ya could u send me vids of the Clubs so I can show them
We're going to the occidental caribe right cause there's two occidental ones which ones
I got you on the Occidental Punta Cana rn. Way nicer amenities than the Caribe and it's where I'll be
But if the group wanted the Caribe instead lmk. The Occ Punta Cana has better rooms, food, and it's where we host some of our pool parties
But the Occ Caribe is a little bigger and has a casino
But in my opinion the Occ Punta Cana outweighs by a lot. I've stayed at both multiple years
So u think occidental punta Cana is nicer then caribe
I just read there's a night club on the caribe one that's why I was asking
There's a nightclub at the Occ Punta Cana too called Mangú
Ok ya then we're gonna stick with that one then lol
also r u guys partners w go blue tours i saw the email and it said go blue tours
Yea for sure, just speaking from experience staying at both
And yea! That's our sister company
Ok cool yeah we're gonna stick with the one you have us at
Thank u for ur help again I'll make sure everyone has there 20 in for Monday
Okay dope yea. I'll send a bunch of videos soon as I can
No prob tho! Happy to help and happy to have yall. I'll be there on site too come March
No prob tho! Happy to help and happy to have yall. I'll be there on site too come March
Will adjust the other slots for a Monday deposit. Already put the note in for the operations team in the am
Kk yay we're all really excited
hey hey! is everyone else still hopping in on the trip?
hey checkin in, its a little tough for me to keep the reservation open without knowing whats up
heyy checkin in, things fall through with the group?
hey i had to close down the reservation, lmk if you guys want to get things rolling again and i can open it back up
sup! you still lookin to get situated for break?
whats up Avery did y'all still need help with spring break or you all set?
yoo Avery did y'all get to book anything for spring break yet
yo Avery wanted to make sure I didnt miss you! is spring break still a thing for y'all or not anymore
